Found this AL file while scanning but co: Found this AL file while scanning but could not re-locate the text in the editor (encoding or line endings). Try Search or a shorter caption.
Open a workspace to search AL files.
No matching single-quoted caption in sca: No matching single-quoted caption in scanned AL files (substrings are ignored). Opened Search — try the Xliff Generator note or a shorter phrase.
Could not find this trans-unit in the XM: Could not find this trans-unit in the XML. If the file changed on disk, reload the editor.
Resolve all Git merge conflicts in the p: Resolve all Git merge conflicts in the panel above before editing other trans-units.
Choose current (ours) or incoming (their: Choose current (ours) or incoming (theirs) per block, or use Accept all. Each action saves the file and reloads conflicts so indices stay in sync. The translation editor stays hidden until all conflicts are resolved.
Leave all unchecked to show every state. Check one or more to list rows in any of those states.
Show rows where the target text is blank: Show rows where the target text is blank (whitespace only), regardless of state. Use when status is wrong but the cell is empty.
BC XLF trans-unit ids are compiler hashe: BC XLF trans-unit ids are compiler hashes (they do not match AL object names). Use AL to find captions in *.al (source text + Xliff note hints). Use XLF to jump to the XML.
Open AL: finds single-quoted strings aft: Open AL: finds single-quoted strings after Caption / ToolTip / Label in the source (and target), searches those literals in .al files, and uses the Xliff Generator note to rank matches when several files contain the same text.
Reveal this trans-unit in the XLF XML: Reveal this trans-unit in the XLF XML
Resolve Git merge conflicts in the panel: Resolve Git merge conflicts in the panel above first.
Resolve {0} conflict(s). {1} trans-units: Resolve {0} conflict(s). {1} trans-units in file — editor loads when all are resolved.
— edit target / state; changes apply to: — edit target / state; changes apply to the file buffer
— resolve Git conflicts above to edit t: — resolve Git conflicts above to edit targets
Set a DeepL API key (command BC XLF: Set: Set a DeepL API key (command BC XLF: Set DeepL API key).
Paste your DeepL API authentication key.
Translate source into the target languag: Translate source into the target language with DeepL (requires API key). Does not save the file by itself.
Translate every row with an empty target: Translate every row with an empty target or state needs-translation (requires API key). Respects defer-until-save if enabled.
No trans-units need DeepL (empty target: No trans-units need DeepL (empty target or needs-translation).
Could not apply translation edits before: Could not apply translation edits before save: {0}
Edits apply to the XML when you save the: Edits apply to the XML when you save the file (Ctrl+S).
Unsaved changes in the panel — save (Ctr: Unsaved changes in the panel — save (Ctrl+S) to write them to the XML.
